field.label: Interface
field.help: Select which interface this subnet belongs too.

field.label: Dynamic Prefix
field.help: Use the identity association prefix allocated to this interface and generate subnet and pools automatically. DHCP options that are not auto collected are unaffected by prefix changes and remain static.

field.label: Subnet
field.help: Subnet to use, should be large enough to hold the specified pools and reservations

field.label: Allocator
field.help: Select allocator method to use when offering leases to clients.

field.label: PD Allocator
field.help: Select allocator method to use when offering prefix delegations to clients

field.label: Pools
field.help: List of pools, one per line in range or subnet format (e.g. 2001:db8:1::-2001:db8:1::100, 2001:db8:1::/80

field.label: Valid lifetime
field.help: Valid lifetime for this subnet scope.

field.label: Description
field.help: You may enter a description here for your reference (not parsed).

field.label: Auto collect option data
field.help: Automatically update option data for relevant attributes such as dns servers when applying settings from the gui. When using a dynamic prefix in a subnet, this will set the correct primary IP address automatically.

field.label: DNS servers
field.help: DNS servers to offer to the clients

field.label: Domain search
field.help: Specifies a search list of Domain Names to be used by the client to locate not-fully-qualified domain names.

field.label: DNR option content
field.help: DNR (Discovery of Network-designated Resolvers) Option, only single backslashes required! See Kea documentation for option "v6-dnr" to understand the syntax.

field.label: Options
field.help: Select custom DHCPv6 options that were created in the options tab.

field.label: DNS forward zone
field.help: DNS zone where DHCP clients should be registered (e.g. "home.arpa.").

field.label: DNS reverse zone
field.help: Full reverse DNS zone receiving PTR updates (e.g. "8.b.d.0.1.0.0.2.ip6.arpa."). This will not be dynamically adjusted if the subnet is configured with a dynamic prefix.

field.label: DNS qualifying suffix
field.help: If a DHCP client only sends a hostname in option 81, append this suffix to create an FQDN (e.g. "home.arpa.").

field.label: DNS server address
field.help: Authoritative DNS server receiving dynamic updates.

field.label: DNS server port
field.help: Port of the authoritative DNS server receiving dynamic updates. Leave empty to use default.

field.label: TSIG key name
field.help: TSIG key name used for secure DNS updates.

field.label: TSIG key secret
field.help: Base64 encoded TSIG key secret.

field.label: TSIG key algorithm
field.help: Algorithm used for TSIG authentication with the DNS server.

field.label: Override no update
field.help: Ignores the client's wishes for no DDNS updates to be performed.

field.label: Override client update
field.help: Ignores the client's delegation requests. Causes Kea to perform Dynamic DNS updates even though the client indicated its intention to perform the updates itself.

field.label: Update on renew
field.help: Instructs the server to always update the DNS information when a lease is renewed, even if its DNS information has not changed. This allows Kea to self-heal if it was previously unable to add DNS entries or they were somehow lost by the DNS server. May impact performance, especially for servers with numerous clients that renew often.

field.label: Conflict resolution mode
field.help: Controls how DDNS conflicts with DHCID records are handled. The default enforces client ownership via DHCID.
